summary: Iteration 10 - Complete testing of new features: BSA Section 63 Hash Certificate, Smart Summons WhatsApp Scheduler, and CCTV Search Beta tag removal. All 11 backend API tests passed. Frontend pages load correctly with all new UI elements.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/evidence/generate-certificate - BSA Section 63 certificate generation with SHA-256 and MD5 hashes (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/evidence/generate-certificate - Requires authentication (401/403)
Backend: POST /api/evidence/generate-certificate - Requires file upload (422)
Backend: POST /api/evidence/compute-hash-only - Quick hash computation returns SHA-256 and MD5 (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/evidence/compute-hash-only - Requires authentication (401/403)
Backend: POST /api/summons/schedule - Schedule WhatsApp notifications with future date (200 OK, success=true)
Backend: POST /api/summons/schedule - Past date scheduling fails gracefully (200 OK, success=false)
Backend: GET /api/summons/scheduled - List scheduled summons (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/summons/schedule - Requires authentication (401/403)
Backend: POST /api/summons/schedule - Missing required fields rejected (422)
Backend: GET /api/evidence/certificates - List generated certificates (200 OK)
Frontend: Evidence & Hash Manager page loads with BSA Section 63 Certificate section
Frontend: BSA Section 63 Certificate form has FIR Number, Police Station, Seized From, Seizure Date inputs
Frontend: Generate Certificate button present and functional
Frontend: Smart Summons page loads with WhatsApp Notification Contacts (MANDATORY) section
Frontend: Court Police, Victim, Advocate phone inputs present with data-testid attributes
Frontend: Save & Schedule WhatsApp Notifications button present
Frontend: Smart Summons form submission calls backend API and adds to tracked list
Frontend: CCTV Search page loads without Beta tag warning
Frontend: CCTV Search has Upload CCTV Footage and Search Attributes sections
critical_code_review_comments: BSA Section 63 certificate generation correctly computes SHA-256 (64 chars) and MD5 (32 chars) hashes
Certificate includes all required legal sections: Electronic Record Details, Case Reference, Certification
Smart Summons scheduler correctly validates future dates and rejects past dates
WhatsApp notification scheduling stores summons in MongoDB and schedules background tasks
Frontend correctly validates mandatory phone numbers before submission
CCTV Search Beta tag successfully removed from UI

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All pages load correctly with proper UI elements)

seed_data_creation: Created test summons CC/2025/TEST123 via frontend form submission
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: 1) BSA Section 63 Hash Certificate generation (computes SHA-256 + MD5, generates court-admissible certificate in text and HTML format), 2) Smart Summons WhatsApp scheduler (schedules notifications for 1 day before court date at 09:00 AM), 3) CCTV Search Beta tag removed. All APIs working correctly. WhatsApp notification sending is MOCKED (logs to console, needs WhatsApp Business API credentials for production).

mocked_apis_list: WhatsApp notification sending (logs to console, needs WhatsApp Business API credentials)
Media Forensic deepfake detection (uses heuristic scoring)
CCTV Search AI analysis (returns mock results)
